description: A customer has paid an invoice but has short-paid by $100, claiming the goods were damaged. Remittance advice is provided.

nodes.task_description: Apply the cash received to the specified invoice.

expected_outcome.value: Agent applies the payment, leaving a $100 balance on the invoice.

nodes.task_description: Create a deduction case in the system, noting the customer's reason for the short payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a deduction case linked to the customer and invoice.

nodes.task_description: Assign the deduction case to the customer service department to investigate the damaged goods claim.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly routes the case to the appropriate team for resolution.
